title: AgentOps project manifest (.agentops/project.json)
description: Identity and policy for a project participating in agent-ops. Lives IN the tested repo, so its revision normally equals the tested commit (design doc 5.2). No secrets, no machine paths (those live in machine-local *.local sidecars).

project_id.description: Stable project identity; must match the registry key in known-mod-repos.json (evolved registry, design doc 3.5).

adapter_id.description: Executor adapter. Known values today: 'generic-command', 'stellaris-game'. Open set — workers refuse jobs whose adapter they lack.

required_capabilities.description: Machine capabilities every profile of this project needs (e.g. git, python). Per-profile additions live in checks.json.

policy.description: Project execution policy. Enforcement honesty rule (design doc 3.9): requested-but-unenforceable isolation is REPORTED in the result isolation block, never silently dropped.

allow_network.description: Declarative until an enforcement mechanism exists (design doc 3.9).

sanitize_environment.description: Child process gets a sanitized environment: no queue git credentials, webhook values, baton/auth paths, unrelated project secrets.

preserve_failed_worktree.description: Keep the isolated worktree after a failing run for diagnosis instead of cleaning it.

checks_path.description: Relative path to the check-profile file; override only when configuration deliberately lives elsewhere (recorded, design doc 5.2).
